title: Divine Beast Dancing Lion
description: A massive lion-like divine beast controlled by the power of storm and lightning, serving as a guardian of the Shadow Realm. This fearsome creature dances with deadly grace, wielding the tempest as a weapon against all who dare approach the realm of shadow.

title: Rellana Twin Moon Knight
description: A knight of immense power who wields the twin moons, a master of both sorcery and incantation. Rellana served Messmer in the Land of Shadow, wielding blades imbued with the light of two moons to cut down any who would oppose her lord.

title: Messmer the Impaler
description: A demigod son of Marika who was exiled to the Land of Shadow, erased from the Golden Order's history. Messmer commands serpentine fire with terrifying ferocity, impaling his enemies upon his great spear while his flames consume all that once lived in shadow.

title: Metyr Mother of Fingers
description: A horrifying being that serves as the progenitor of the Two Fingers, a primordial entity that communicates the will of the Greater Will. Metyr dwells in the deepest sanctum of Enir-Ilim, a writhing mass of fingers and divine power that has long since lost its original purpose.

title: Putrescent Knight
description: A knight bound to the Finger Ruins, corrupted by the festering power of rot and death. This spectral warrior rides a pale horse and wields frost and scarlet rot, a guardian of the ancient ruins who has been transformed into something neither living nor dead.

title: Romina Saint of the Bud
description: Once a saint who came from the far east, Romina was transformed by the scarlet rot into a horrifying insectoid creature of immense power. She embodies the spreading bud of rot's bloom and guards the passage deeper into the ancient ruins, her body a fusion of woman and centipede.

title: Commander Gaius
description: A loyal commander who served Messmer in the conquest of the Land of Shadow, now continuing his eternal vigil atop his great war boar. Gaius was one of Messmer's most trusted officers, a powerful warrior who charges down enemies with unstoppable force and gravitational magic.

title: Scadutree Avatar
description: A massive divine being that serves as the embodiment of the Scadutree, the great shadow tree that defines the Land of Shadow. This towering entity of wood and sacred power protects the roots of the Scadutree, an ancient guardian formed from the very essence of shadow and blight.

title: Midra Lord of Frenzied Flame
description: Once a lord who sought to contain the frenzied flame within himself to protect others from its madness, Midra ultimately succumbed to its power and became its vessel. He dwells within the Abyssal Woods, a place of profound stillness hiding an apocalyptic force of yellow flame behind his genteel appearance.

title: Bayle the Dread
description: An ancient and supremely powerful dragon who broke away from the ways of the ancient dragons to pursue his own devastating path of conquest. Bayle is feared even among dragonkind, a creature of immense ferocity and flame who makes his lair atop the Jagged Peak, having defeated countless challengers including the legendary Igon's companions.

title: Promised Consort Radahn
description: The reborn Starscourge Radahn, resurrected through Miquella's machinations and fused with the power of Miquella's own divinity. As Miquella's promised consort, Radahn serves as the final guardian of Enir-Ilim, wielding both his iconic gravity-infused blades and the golden radiance of Miquella's charm in a battle of apocalyptic scale.

title: Golden Hippopotamus
description: A colossal hippopotamus encrusted with golden thorns and imbued with sacred power, serving as a guardian of the Shadow Keep. This unlikely but terrifying beast charges and swallows intruders whole, its golden spines erupting from its body to impale any who would threaten the keep's inner sanctum.

title: Demi-Human Swordmaster Onze
description: A remarkably skilled demi-human who has mastered the art of the sword beyond what most of his kind could ever achieve. Onze leads his demi-human kin with fierce loyalty and combative brilliance, wielding his blade with speed and precision that belies his demi-human heritage.

title: Ghostflame Dragon
description: A spectral dragon suffused with the cold blue fire of ghostflame, an undead draconic entity that haunts the desolate reaches of the Land of Shadow. Unlike living dragons, this creature breathes ghostflame that chills the soul as much as the body, a remnant of death's dominion over the shadowed lands.

title: Rugalea the Great Red Bear
description: A titanic bear of fearsome power roaming the wilds of the Land of Shadow, its fur matted with the blood of countless prey. Rugalea is a beast of pure ferocity with no loyalty save to its own savage nature, a territorial predator that has claimed a vast stretch of the shadow realm as its hunting ground.
